svg.title: Mermaid fragments
svg.desc: Demonstrates Mermaid loop, alt, else, and opt fragment transforms. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/06-fragments/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/06-fragments
svg.text: Demonstrates Mermaid loop, alt, else, and opt fragment transforms.
From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with:
Retry while pending [Mermaid: loop Retry while pending]
3. Emit audit event [Mermaid: Service->>Caller: Emit audit event]
Failure branch note [Mermaid: Note over Caller,Service: Failure branch note]
